dietary_rules: Every day must include a plant protein: beans, chickpeas, lentils, edamame, tofu, paneer, or similar
No pasta, orzo, rice, or other grain-based salads
Use DRIED beans/chickpeas/lentils, never canned. Include soak + cook times and dried quantities (1 cup dried beans ~ 2.5 cups cooked)
notes_to_agent: Prefer recipes where prep can be batched on the weekend (chop veg, cook beans, make dressing jars). Consolidate the weekend prep list across all 7 recipes.
